texto: Audiences like me doing action and comedy. I am a jovial person and have been so from childhood. I like to laugh my way through my work, and that attitude reflects in my roles. Even women hate me doing rona-dhona roles. So I don't do emotional films.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ravi Teja: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Audiences like me doing action and comedy. I am a jovial person and have been so from childhood. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, work, women pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e women.
